title: Notifications - Update failed OFF
scenario: No failure notification appears when DFU fails after Device Software Update notifications are disabled in App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Go to App Settings → General → Notifications & Device Alerts
Set 'Device Software Update' notifications to OFF
Navigate to Home screen and connect to a Poly Bluetooth audio device
Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Firmware Update (or equivalent DFU path)
During the first 20% of the update, put the Poly Studio Mobile app into the background
While the app is in the background, turn off the Bluetooth audio device (e.g., press and hold Power button to power off)
Wait a few seconds, then bring the app back to the foreground
expected: No failure notification is displayed in the app, because Device Software Update notifications are turned OFF.
